releases.author: LykAunn
releases.description:
# Calendar Planner v0.1.0-beta
 
> **Pre-release** вҖ” This is an early version for testing and feedback.
 
## What is Calendar Planner?
 
A modified calendar plugin that reads from a **single master planner file** instead of individual daily notes. See your tasks and events at a glance, right on the calendar.
 
---
 
## Features
 
- **Single planner file** вҖ” All your entries in one `planner.md` file
- **Visual calendar** вҖ” See actual entry text on each day (not just dots)
- **Task management** вҖ” Check off tasks directly from the calendar
- **Checkbox support** вҖ” Full `[ ]` and `[x]` syntax support
- **Quick navigation** вҖ” Jump to any date in your planner file
- **Flexible formats** вҖ” Supports `DD/MM/YYYY` and `YYYY-MM-DD` date formats
 
---
 
## рҹ“ё Preview
 
Each day shows your entries directly on the calendar:
 
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Mon в”Ӯ Tue в”Ӯ Wed в”Ӯ Thu в”Ӯ Fri в”Ӯ Sat в”Ӯ Sun в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  16 в”Ӯ  17 в”Ӯ  18 в”Ӯ  19 в”Ӯ  20 в”Ӯ  21 в”Ӯ  22 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”ӮLunchв”Ӯ     в”ӮMeetвҖҰв”Ӯ     в”ӮWorkвҖҰв”Ӯ     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”ӮCallвҖҰв”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”ӮGym  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ+2   в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
 
Click any day to view full details and manage tasks.

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Settings
 
| Setting | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Planner file path | Path to your planner file (default: `planner.md`) |
| Date format | `DD/MM/YYYY` or `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| Max entries per day | How many entries to show on calendar (1-6) |
 
---
 
## Known Issues
 
- This is a pre-release, expect some rough edges
- Complex nested lists are not fully supported yet
 
---
 
## Feedback
 
This is an early release! Please report any bugs or suggestions:
 
- Open an issue on GitHub
- Describe what happened vs what you expected
- Include your planner.md format if relevant
 
---

## рҹҷҸ Credits
 
Based on the [Obsidian Calendar Plugin](https://github.com/liamcain/obsidian-calendar-plugin) by Liam Cain.
 
---
 
**Full Changelog**: First pre-release
releases.name: Initial Pre Release
